title: Build Something — daily-routine + 'be dope' identity drill, Dec 2023
html:
TL;DR

  • Two stacked drills written Dec 22 2023. First: daily routine — 8am wake up, 2 hours of deep work, know the outline of what you need to accomplish.
  • Second: a "Be someone dope" identity drill —
    • Be genuine as fuck, no filtered bullshit.
    • Work daily to be nice and optimistic; make it your default.
    • Have breadth of one's legs (sic: "legs"; likely "life") captured through books.
    • Have breadth of experiences captured through travel and work.
    • Get good at "segwrk" (segment-work / sigma-work / typo).
  • The note is mid-OSU senior year, post-Jordan, pre-China — the lull period between the 2023 09 10 mid jordan reflection euphoric peak and the 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook China-prep tornado.

Key quote

"Be genuine as fuck, no filtered bullshit."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Earliest clean statement of the be-genuine-as-fuck → catches-people-off-guard identity-as-strategy that Yahir restates in 2024 12 14 departing china ("Be so truly yourself it catches people off guard").
  • 8am wake up + 2 hours deep work is the operating-routine grandfather of the much later 2026 04 26 health stack supplements + lift-with-intent system.
  • "Breadth via books + travel + work" — explicit triad that informs the six month adventure creed and 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure.

Open questions

  • "Segwrk" — sigma-work? Segment-work? Self-work? Worth checking spelling drift.
  • Did the 8am routine actually stick? Memory's "sleep schedule perpetually wrecked" suggests no.
